---
title: "Mapping Merge"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(scales)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
```

```{r}
admin3_lines <- st_read("source/gmb_admin_boundaries.shp/gmb_admin3_em.shp")
admin1_lines <- st_read("source/gmb_admin_boundaries.shp/gmb_admin1_em.shp")
map_data <- read_csv("output/mapping_merged.csv")
```

```{r}
# Finscope 
# 0. Clean and Prepare
plot_data_all <- map_data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(center_lat), !is.na(center_lon))

matisse_colors <- c(
  "Cash deposited at bank (branch/bank agent/ATM)" = "#D92121", 
  "Money transfer agencies (Western union, MoneyGram," = "#2D5DA1", 
  "Transfer via MFI/Bank" = "#E8C828",                           
  "Banking Transaction via internet / online / mobile" = "#5DA12D",
  "Friends or family" = "#A12D8C",                               
  "Combination of many means, one of which is formal" = "#F28C28", 
  "Combination of many informal means" = "#2D96A1",              
  "Other" = "#7F7F7F"                                   
)

admin1_centers <- admin1_lines %>%
  sf::st_centroid() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = sf::st_coordinates(.)[,1],
    y = sf::st_coordinates(.)[,2]
  ) %>%

  dplyr::filter(!stringr::str_detect(adm1_name, "Banjul")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label_y = case_when(
      adm1_name == "Kanifing Municipal Council" ~ 13.05,
      adm1_name == "West Coast" ~ 13.15,
      adm1_name == "Lower River" ~ 13.17,
      adm1_name == "North Bank" ~ 13.75,
      adm1_name == "Central River North" ~ 13.85,
      adm1_name == "Central River South" ~ 13.10,
      adm1_name == "Upper River" ~ 13.75,
      TRUE ~ 13.5
    )
  )

banjul_data <- admin1_lines %>%
  dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(adm1_name, "Banjul")) %>%
  sf::st_centroid() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = sf::st_coordinates(.)[,1],
    y = sf::st_coordinates(.)[,2]
  )
```

```{r}
# 1. Aggregate: Calculate percentage AND count (n) per district
district_stats <- map_data %>%
  group_by(match_key) %>% 
  summarise(
    n = n(), # Count of rows for size
    dom_pct = mean(domestic_receive == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    int_pct = mean(international_receive == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    lat = first(center_lat),
    lon = first(center_lon)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lat)) 

# 2. Plotting Function: Color = % (Value), Size = Count (n)
plot_district_map <- function(data, value_col, title) {
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = admin3_lines, fill = "white", color = "grey80") +
    geom_sf(data = admin1_lines, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.8) +
    
    geom_segment(data = admin1_centers, 
               aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = label_y), 
               color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
    geom_text(data = admin1_centers, 
            aes(x = x, y = label_y, label = adm1_name), 
            size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey30", vjust = ifelse(admin1_centers$label_y > 13.6, -0.5, 1.5)) +
    geom_segment(data = banjul_data, 
               aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, xend = center_lon, yend = 13.8), 
               color = "red", size = 0.5) +
    geom_text(data = banjul_data, 
            aes(x = center_lon, y = 13.8, label = lga_en), 
            color = "red", fontface = "bold", size = 5, vjust = -0.5) +
    coord_sf(ylim = c(13.0, 13.9)) +

    geom_point(data = data, aes(x = lon, y = lat, 
                                color = {{value_col}}, 
                                size = n), 
               alpha = 0.8) + 

    scale_color_gradient(low = "#e0e0e0", 
                         high = "#d92121", 
                         limits = c(0, 50), 
                         oob = scales::squish) + 

    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 10)) + 
    theme_void() +
    labs(title = title, color = "% of Yes", size = "Sample Size")
}

# 3. Generate Maps
map1 <- plot_district_map(district_stats, dom_pct, "Domestic Receive in the Past 12 Months (%)")
map2 <- plot_district_map(district_stats, int_pct, "International Receive in the Past 12 Months (%)")
```

```{r}
# 4. Map for Means Receive (Categorical)
plot_data_map3 <- plot_data_all %>%
  filter(!is.na(means_receive)) %>% 
  mutate(clean_method = means_receive %>%
           str_replace("^[0-9]+\\.\\s*", "") %>% 
           str_replace_all("\\?", "") %>% 
           str_replace("\\s*\\(specify.*", "") %>%
           str_trim())

map3 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = admin3_lines, fill = "white", color = "grey85") +
  geom_sf(data = admin1_lines, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.8) +

    geom_segment(data = admin1_centers, 
               aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = label_y), 
               color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
    geom_text(data = admin1_centers, 
            aes(x = x, y = label_y, label = adm1_name), 
            size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey30", vjust = ifelse(admin1_centers$label_y > 13.6, -0.5, 1.5)) +
    geom_segment(data = banjul_data, 
               aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, xend = center_lon, yend = 13.8), 
               color = "red", size = 0.5) +
    geom_text(data = banjul_data, 
            aes(x = center_lon, y = 13.8, label = lga_en), 
            color = "red", fontface = "bold", size = 5, vjust = -0.5) +
    coord_sf(ylim = c(13.0, 13.9)) +

  geom_point(data = plot_data_map3, 
             aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, color = clean_method), 
             size = 1.8, 
             alpha = 0.6,
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0.05)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = matisse_colors) +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5))) +
  labs(title = "Means of Receive", color = "Method") +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

# Map for Agent Distance
plot_data_dist <- map_data %>%
  filter(!str_detect(mobile_agent_distance, "Don")) %>% 
  mutate(
    dist_val = as.numeric(str_extract(mobile_agent_distance, "^[0-9]+")),
    clean_dist = str_replace(mobile_agent_distance, "^[0-9]+\\.\\s*", "")
  )

map4 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = admin3_lines, fill = "white", color = "grey85") +
  geom_sf(data = admin1_lines, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(data = admin1_centers, 
               aes(x = x, y = y, xend = x, yend = label_y), 
               color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
    geom_text(data = admin1_centers, 
            aes(x = x, y = label_y, label = adm1_name), 
            size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "grey30", vjust = ifelse(admin1_centers$label_y > 13.6, -0.5, 1.5)) +
    geom_segment(data = banjul_data, 
               aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, xend = center_lon, yend = 13.8), 
               color = "red", size = 0.5) +
    geom_text(data = banjul_data, 
            aes(x = center_lon, y = 13.8, label = lga_en), 
            color = "red", fontface = "bold", size = 5, vjust = -0.5) +
    coord_sf(ylim = c(13.0, 13.9)) +
  
  geom_point(data = plot_data_dist, 
             aes(x = center_lon, y = center_lat, color = dist_val), 
             size = 2, alpha = 0.7,
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0.05)) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "#D92121", high = "#2D5DA1", 
                       breaks = c(1, 2, 3),
                       labels = c("1. Less than 10m", "2. 10-20m", "3. 21-30m")) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Mobile Agent Distance", color = "Distance Category") +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
```

```{r}
map4
```

```{r}
ggsave("output/domestic_receive_map.png", plot = map1, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("output/international_receive_map.png", plot = map2, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("output/means_of_receive_map.png", plot = map3, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("output/mobile_agent_distance_map.png", plot = map4, width = 8, height = 6)
```
